channel.title: Snow Leopard on Everything is Gray
channel.description: Recent content in Snow Leopard on Everything is Gray

item.title: Check if Your Mac Is 64 Bit
item.description: Here’s an easy way to determine whether or not your Mac is 64 bit capable. Open Terminal.app, which is located in /Applications/Utilities and type in: sysctl hw | grep 64bit If your machine is 64 bit capable, the result will be hw.cpu64bit_capable: 1 If your machine is not 64 bit capable, the result will be hw.cpu64bit_capable: 0 Tip source: OSXDaily.com
